commit_message:
Decoder edge case updates Decoder edge case updates Update decoder to handle some possible edge cases,
* Force an unlock if a misalignment of the IRIG frame occurs sometime after the initial lock.
* Add 100us tolerance just in case a short IRIG bit is encountered
* Freeze IRIG bit width counter when signal bit de-asserts to make sure it doesn't over-count width. 
* Add IRIG state machine state debug output
* Fix bit swap in test bench

Cheers!
